title: MPESB MP Police Subedar Stenographer ASI Skill Test Admit Card 2026
short_information: Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) has relased Subedar (Stenographer) & Asst. Sub-Inspector Recruitment Test 2025 Recruitment 2025. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this MPESB Subedar (Stenographer) & Asst. Sub-Inspector Recruitment Test 2025 Exam 2026 can Download the Skill Test Admit Card. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information. application_fee: General / Other State : 560/- OBC / SC / ST : 310/- Portal Charges: Rs. 60/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking MPESB MP Police Subedar Stenographer, ASI Ministerial
eligibility: Read the Notification. Assistant Sub Inspector ASI Ministerial 400 10+2 Intermediate Exam Passed. CPCT Certificate with Hindi Typing. Engineering Degree / MCA / BCA / M.Sc Computer Science / IT / Diploma. Computer Diploma from DOEACC OR COPA / ITI / Computer Diploma. Height Male : 162 CMS, Female 152 CMS. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
